meaning: 奥克尼郡[英国苏格兰原郡名]
examples: One site alone, the Pentland Firth, between Orkney and mainland Scotland, could produce 10% of the country's electricity with banks of turbines under the sea.
The Orkney Islands are a neolithic site of extraordinary richness.
Orkney artist Sam MacDonald's work is becoming increasingly well known.
The Oyster has been undergoing sea trials at the European Marine Energy Centre (EMEC) in Orkney since November.
Last year a ram from Shropshire was confirmed with the virus after being transported to Orkney.
